overall.description: A first-person perspective sequence from a cyberpunk video game showing a character riding an elevator from a dark interior up to a vibrant night market. The character exits into a neon-lit Asian-inspired street market filled with red lanterns and food stalls, then approaches and examines a food vendor's display counter with holographic pricing.

events.description: elevator doors slide open revealing dark corridor beyond
character steps into the elevator and turns to face the interior
NPC in white shirt walks past the elevator entrance briefly blocking the view

agents.ego_description: approaching the elevator, waiting for doors to open, and stepping inside the cabin

notable_agents.action: person wearing white shirt and red cap walks past the elevator entrance from left to right

entered.detail: large metal sliding doors with diagonal brace patterns and frosted glass panels
wall-mounted control panel with glowing green interface and downward arrow symbol
dark red padded metal walls with vertical seams and rivets
black rectangular screens mounted on the walls with small green indicator lights
yellow and black floor selection panel with holographic text display

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a closed elevator in a dimly lit corridor. The doors open to reveal a dark interior with red padded walls. The character enters the elevator, turning to face the control panel as an NPC briefly walks past the entrance.

events.description: elevator begins ascending as indicated by the floor display changing
elevator doors begin to open revealing bright light from the market outside

agents.ego_description: standing stationary inside the elevator cabin as it ascends to the street level

segments.scene_description: Inside the ascending elevator, the character observes the red padded walls and monitor screens while the floor indicator changes. The elevator doors remain closed until the final moments when they begin to open, flooding the cabin with bright light from the destination.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk night market street with hanging lanterns

events.description: exiting the elevator from dark interior into bright neon-lit outdoor market
moving from the bright elevator threshold into the ambient neon lighting of the street

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the night market street, looking around at the stalls and neon signage

entered.detail: narrow urban street lined with market stalls and overhead wires
numerous red Chinese lanterns hanging in clusters across the street
wooden market stall with striped awning and warm interior lighting
large cyan and yellow illuminated sign with text and graphics
dense multi-story buildings with balconies and external air conditioning units

segments.scene_description: The character exits the elevator into a vibrant cyberpunk night market illuminated by red paper lanterns and cyan neon signs. The camera moves forward through the narrow street, passing wooden food stalls and looking up at the dense urban architecture and overhead walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor stall with display counter

events.description: approaching and stopping at the food stall counter to examine the display
moving from open street to standing under the stall canopy near the food display

agents.ego_description: examining the food display counter with holographic price tags, panning across the various dishes and plates

entered.detail: glass-topped counter displaying various food items with glowing cyan holographic price tags
tall stack of white ceramic plates on the corner of the counter
grill and food preparation area with steam rising behind the counter
pink and red bar stools lined up along the customer side of the counter

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a food vendor stall and examines the display counter featuring holographic price tags showing '8.00 EB' and '9.00 EB'. The camera pans across the glass counter showing plates of food, stacked dishes, and cooking equipment, all sheltered under a striped canopy with red lanterns visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, claustrophobic interior into the overwhelming brilliance of a cyberpunk night market. It begins in a dark corridor where the camera enters a red-padded elevator, turning toward the control panel as the doors seal shut. As the elevator ascends, the enclosed space remains dark until the doors slide open, flooding the cabin with light and transitioning the scene into a vibrant street filled with cyan neon signs and red paper lanterns. The camera then moves forward through the narrow market, passing wooden stalls and towering urban architecture before approaching a food vendor. Finally, the view settles on a glass display counter, panning across plates of food and holographic price tags under a striped canopy.
